creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: Doh! I meant 'diskinfo -v /dev/ada0' not devinfo (Which is also a command, but the wrong one). I need it for the exact size of the disk so I can recreate that (I know it won't have the FS on it, but I need to get the partitions, at least). I strongly suspect some well meaning 'alignment' code is bogusly rejecting legitimate MBRs/EBRs.
